title: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK SERENITY CLUB SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support and a meeting space for all 12-step recovery groups. Opioid overdose supplies are available to the public in a weatherproof box located outside the building. 5012 3rd Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Meetings: Varies Drop in: Tuesday-Friday 11am-7:30pm Opioid overdose kit: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 842-1115 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-1115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for meeting times. Call or email for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: General Addictions/Substance Use Disorder Support Groups Opioid Antidote Distribution Other Services Offered At This Location: TRANSPORTATION - COMMUNITY RESOURCE ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK SERENITY CLUB
